name: cortex-schema
description: Generate cortex ontology resources (ontology.ttl, shapes.ttl, ontology.rules) from natural-language requirements

plugins.name: cortex-schema
plugins.description: Generate strict SHACL-based cortex ontology resources from plain-English class/property descriptions. Ensures closed-world validation, enforces cardinality/type constraints, and prevents direct assertion of inferred-only classes.
